# Pull Request Metadata

- **Priority ID(s)**: <!-- e.g., 1 / 2 / 3 / 6 -->
- **Dependency Chain (base -> dependent)**: <!-- e.g., #123 -> #124 -->
- **Chain-head PR? (yes/no)**:
- **Required Checks Evidence**: <!-- list exact commands + pass output/links -->
- **Merge-boundary Revalidation Notes**: <!-- note rebase/re-run status after parent merges -->
- **Release-impact Notes**: <!-- none, patch, minor, major, or release-flow/tooling impact -->
